pi_items.source: ArXiv 1706.03762 and NeurIPS 2017 proceedings - 'Attention Is All You Need' paper lists Ashish Vaswani as first author
Nature journal volume 521, 2015 - 'Deep Learning' review article lists Yann LeCun as first author
Nature journal volume 521, 2015 - 'Deep Learning' review article lists author as Yann LeCun with capital C
ArXiv 1406.2661 and NeurIPS 2014 proceedings - 'Generative Adversarial Nets' paper lists Ian J. Goodfellow as first author

privileged_info_summary: The task involves correcting author metadata for three real papers in a Zotero library. All four metadata claims are verified: (1) The first author of 'Attention Is All You Need' (2017) is Ashish Vaswani; (2) The first author of 'Deep Learning' (2015) is Yann LeCun; (3) The correct capitalization of LeCun's last name is 'LeCun'; (4) The first author of 'Generative Adversarial Nets' (2014) is Ian J. Goodfellow with the middle initial included. These are real papers published in peer-reviewed venues (NeurIPS, Nature, ArXiv).
